The leaves of Odontophyllum weberbaueri have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. Bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal effects.
